prestazioni: Engine swap to a **TU5JP4** (1.6L 16V, 110hp stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger, custom **3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust** by **SCS Performance** (Dakar-spec backbox), and a **Syvecs S6Plus ECU** mapped for 280hp on **100-octane fuel** with **Bosch Motorsport 850cc injectors** and a **Nissan SR20DET oil pump** for high-RPM reliability.

Full **Ohlins TTX40 2-way adjustable dampers** with **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs** (Dakar-spec valving), **Polyurethane bushings** from **SuperPro** (part #SPF0116K) for the rear trailing arms, and **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** (330mm discs) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for desert endurance braking.

Custom **3.5L aluminum fuel cell** by **ATL** (Dakar-approved, baffled for high-G off-road), **Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump**, and a **HJS 200°C catalytic converter** (for FIA compliance) paired with a **SamcoSport silicone intake hose kit** (reinforced for dust ingress prevention).
estetica: Full **Dakar-spec fiberglass body kit** by **Citroën Sport** (1994 Raid replica, part #ZX94-5000), including **carbon-Kevlar hood** (2.5kg weight reduction) and **polycarbonate rear quarter windows** (with **3M Scotchgard** anti-scratch coating).

**BBS RG-R 16x8 ET0 wheels** (Dakar-spec, 5x108 PCD) wrapped in **Michelin Latitude Cross Desert 235/85R16 tires** (run-flat inserts by **TireJect**), with **custom wheel spacers** (15mm front, 20mm rear) by **H&R** for aggressive stance.

**LED light bar** by **Rigid Industries** (E-Series Pro 50-inch, 40,000 lumens) mounted on a **custom aluminum roof rack** (CNC-machined by **AluRack**), paired with **Hella Rallye 4000 spotlights** (Dakar homologated) and **carbon fiber side mirrors** (OMP Dakar-spec).
